title: Go Your Own Way (Ma-at)
content:
Apne Raste Jana (Ma-at)

Adhyatmik Vikas/Pragati Ke Vibhinn Padavon Se Gujarane Ke Dauran Hum Sansarik Astitva Mein Ate Hain.

Har Ek Ko Apana Jeevan Jeena Chahie, Aur Hum Mein Se Har Ek Ko Ma-at Ke Dikhaye, Apne — Apne Raston Par Jana Chahie. Prarambhik Kal Se Lekar Samooche Misri Itihas Ke Sabhi Lekhanon Mein, Ma-at Ki Avadharana Maujood Hai. Yeh Vah Avadharana Hai, Jiske Dvara Na Keval Manav, Balki Neteru (Devi-Devta) Bhi Swaym Ko Niyantrit Karte Hain. Ma-at Ko Ek Shabd Ke Madhyam Se Anuvad Karna Ya Spasht Karna Asan Nahi Hai. Asal Mein, Hum Iska Matlab, ‘Kya Hona Chahie, Ya Kya Theek Hai’ Kah Sakate Hain, Arthat Brahmanda, Neteru Tatha Log-Jo Iska Hissa Hain, Uchit Kram Aur Sangati Mein Hain.

Ma-at Ko, Karma Ki Poorvi Avadharana Aur Common Sense Ki Pashchimi Avadharana Ke Ird-Gird Rakh Sakate Hain.

Ma-at, Vo Rasta Hai Jismein Guna, Lakshy, Aur Kartavy Shamil Hote Hain, Jo Adarsh Nahi To Kam Se Kam Sveekarya, Samajik Sampark Aur Vyaktigat Vyavahar Ko Paribhashit Karte Hain. Sansar Mein, Shraddhaluon Dvara, Ma-at Ka Palan Sahi Karyaon Aur Vyaktigat Sheel Ke Madhyam Kiya Jata Hai.

Pracheen Misri Gyan Ne, Naitik Vyavahar Aur Samaj Ki Seva Par Behad Zor Diya Hai. Sansar Mein, Satya — Ma-Kheru — Ka ‘Acharan’, Hi Misri Gyan Sahity Ka Sada Vishay Raha.

Dharma Ki Misri Avadharana Ko, Nakaratmak Sveekarokti (Agale Adhyay Mein Jiski Charcha Ki Gayi Hai) Ke Nam Se Mashahoor Saransh Mein Dekha Ja Sakta Hai. Makabare Ke Poojagharon Ki Deevaron Aur Sahityik Rachanaon Mein Dharmik Manusy, Apekshit Acharan, Kartavy Aur Pratifal Adi Vicharon Ka Adhik Vistrit Chitr Milta Hai, Jinhein Amtaur Par Sookti Aur Upadeshon Mein Rachit, Vyavasthit Nirdeshon Ka Gyan Path Kaha Jata Hai. Inamein Se 30 Adhyay Amaine mope (Ameinhotep III) Ki Shikshaon Se Sambadhit Hai, Jismein Kayi Aise Gyanapath Shamil Hain, Jinhein Bad Mein Old Testameint Ke Neetivachan Ki Pustak Apanaya Gaya.

Is Misri Path Aur Bayibal Ke Beech Kayi Maukhik Samanatayen Milati Hain, Jaise Ki Pehle Adhyay Ke Prarambhik Panktiyon Mein:

Bole Jane Vale Shabdon Par, Kan Do, Apne  Man Ko

Use Samajhane Do. Unhein Apne Dil Mein Rakhana Hitakar Hai. Iske Alava, Sookti Aur Upadeshon Mein Rachit, Vyavasthit Nirdeshon Ke Atirikt Vyavaharik Gyanapath Bhi Hain, Jo ‘Kya Karen’ Aur ‘Kya Na Karen’, Ke Bare Mein Batate Hain. Ye Insan Ko Doson Ko Nakarne (Bachana) Aur Sadachar Ko Apanane (Posana Karna) Donon Ki Shiksha Dete Hain.

Misri Shikshayen Is Bat Par Zor Deteen Hain, Ki Vyakti Ki Samaj Mein Sakriya Bhageedari Honi Chahie. Tatha Doosaron Ki Seva Se Ve Jo Bhi Seekhen Hain, Uska Istemal Karen. Us Stree/Purush Ki Safalata Ki Asali Pareeksha, Samaj Mein Uska Vyaktigat Pradarshan Hai.

Sabhi Vyaktiyon Ke Pas Apne Aur Apne Ashriton Ka Bharana-Posana Karne Ke Liye Koi Utpadak Karya Avashy Hona Chahie. Sansar Se Koi Sevanivritti Nahi Hai, Yani Na Koi Bhikshu, Na Tapasvi. Misri Adars, Sansar Mein Rahne Aur Adhyatmikata Ko Prapt Karne Ke Beech Santulan Paida Karne Par Zor Dalata Hai.

(Misri Rahasyavad: Path Ke Saadhak dvaara likhit Moustafa Gadalla)

 

[isaka ek ansh:Misr Ka Brahmanada Vigyan:Sajeev Brahmanada, Teesra Sanskaran dvaara likhit Moustafa Gadalla]
